subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis served as the Dungeon Master for the session.
source_quote: run by Kostadis (Dungeon Master)

subject: Nikhil
fact: Nikhil played the character Zenvon.
source_quote: with Nikhil as the player controlling the character Zenvon

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon is a rogue.
source_quote: Zenvon (a rogue)

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar was rescued by the party.
source_quote: rescued Sildar

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar revealed the party was ambushed on the Triboar Trail.
source_quote: Revealed the party was ambushed on the Triboar Trail

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar stated that someone tipped off the goblins about the ambush.
source_quote: someone tipped off the goblins — it was not a random robbery

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar reported that Gundren was dragged away separately from the ambush.
source_quote: Gundren was dragged away separately

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar overheard the name Black Spider among the goblins.
source_quote: the name 'Black Spider' was overheard among the goblins

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar identified himself as a member of the Lord's Alliance.
source_quote: Identified himself as a member of the Lord's Alliance

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar stressed the importance of capturing or eliminating Klarg.
source_quote: stressed the importance of capturing or eliminating Klarg

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar declined to join the party due to injuries and other missions.
source_quote: Sildar declined, citing injuries and other missions

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar agreed to wait at the camp.
source_quote: Agreed to wait at the camp

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar offered 50 gold pieces for an escort to Neverwinter or Phandalin.
source_quote: offered to pay 50 gold pieces for an escort to Neverwinter/Phandalin

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar mentioned a strange goblin with an elongated head was present during the ambush.
source_quote: Mentioned a strange goblin with an elongated head who was present during the ambush

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar whispered the phrase 'You're not what Ruxithid wants' regarding the elongated-headed goblin.
source_quote: whispered an unknown phrase: 'You're not what Ruxithid wants.'

subject: Pip
fact: Pip was present during the cave entrance combat.
source_quote: including Pip, Sister Maela, and Veyra

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela was present during the cave entrance combat.
source_quote: including Pip, Sister Maela, and Veyra

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela cast Cure Wounds to heal Zenvon to full health.
source_quote: Sister Maela cast Cure Wounds, healing Zenvon to full (16 HP including temp HP)

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela used animal handling to subdue the remaining wolves.
source_quote: Sister Maela successfully used animal handling to subdue the remaining wolves

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela provided light to the party.
source_quote: until Sister Maela provided light

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra was caught in a flood triggered by goblins releasing a dam.
source_quote: Veyra failed her dexterity saving throw and was caught in the flood

subject: Veyra
fact: Zenvon grabbed Veyra before she was swept away.
source_quote: Rolled a 19 on sleight of hand to grab Veyra before she was swept away

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra used Magic Missile to deal 15 points of damage to Klarg.
source_quote: Used Magic Missile for 15 points of damage on Klarg

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra killed a fleeing goblin with a critical firebolt for 7 points of damage.
source_quote: killed a fleeing goblin with a critical firebolt (7 points of damage)

subject: Gundren
fact: Gundren was missing and dragged away during the ambush.
source_quote: Gundren was dragged away separately

subject: Klarg
fact: Klarg is a bugbear and the leader of the goblins.
source_quote: bugbear leader Klarg

subject: Klarg
fact: Klarg appeared and engaged the party in the main cavern.
source_quote: Klarg the bugbear appeared and engaged the party

subject: Klarg
fact: Zenvon landed the killing blow on Klarg using a Nick scimitar and dagger combo.
source_quote: Landed the killing blow on Klarg using Nick scimitar + dagger combo for 8 points of damage

subject: Klarg
fact: Klarg had 5 hit points remaining when he was killed.
source_quote: Klarg had 5 HP remaining

subject: Lord's Alliance
fact: The Lord's Alliance is described as the ruling castes of major city-states favoring centralized power.
source_quote: Described the Lord's Alliance as the ruling castes of major city-states, favoring centralized power

subject: Harpers
fact: The Harpers are committed to preventing any single faction from gaining full control.
source_quote: Described the Harpers as committed to preventing any single faction from gaining full control

subject: Order of the Gauntlet
fact: The Order of the Gauntlet is described as heroic, combat-focused, and morality-driven.
source_quote: Described the Order of the Gauntlet as heroic, combat-focused, and morality-driven

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: The Emerald Enclave is described as nature-preserving and druid-aligned.
source_quote: Described the Emerald Enclave as nature-preserving, druid-aligned

subject: Zhentarim
fact: The Zhentarim is a trade-controlling criminal organization originally a cult of an evil god.
source_quote: Described the Zhentarim (Black Network) as a trade-controlling criminal organization, originally a cult of an evil god

subject: Lionshield Coster
fact: The Lionshield Coster is a merchant company from Phandalin.
source_quote: symbol of the Lionshield Coster merchant company from Phandalin

subject: Black Spider
fact: The identity and motives of the Black Spider remain unknown.
source_quote: The identity and motives of the Black Spider remain unknown

subject: Ambush on Triboar Trail
fact: The party was ambushed on the Triboar Trail by goblins.
source_quote: party was ambushed on the Triboar Trail

subject: Cragmaw Hideout Clearing
fact: The party successfully cleared the Cragmaw Hideout.
source_quote: The party successfully cleared the Cragmaw Hideout

subject: Zenvon Persuasion Attempt
fact: Zenvon rolled a 16 on persuasion to ask Sildar to join the party.
source_quote: rolled a 16 on persuasion but Sildar declined

subject: Wolf Distraction
fact: Zenvon successfully lured wolves by throwing food.
source_quote: successfully luring the wolves

subject: First Goblin Kill
fact: Zenvon killed the first goblin with 9 points of damage using sneak attack.
source_quote: killing the first goblin with 9 points of damage

subject: Zenvon Bitten by Wolf
fact: A wolf bit Zenvon for 5 points of damage.
source_quote: A wolf bit Zenvon for 5 points of damage

subject: Zenvon Strength Save
fact: Zenvon passed the DC 11 strength saving throw and was not knocked prone.
source_quote: Zenvon passed the DC 11 strength saving throw and was not knocked prone

subject: Flood Triggered
fact: Goblins released a dam triggering a flood that swept through the cave.
source_quote: A flood triggered by goblins releasing a dam swept through the cave

subject: Zenvon Deception
fact: Zenvon rolled a 15 on deception to imitate a goblin voice.
source_quote: Used deception (rolled 15) to imitate a goblin voice

subject: Zenvon Stealth Roll
fact: Zenvon rolled a natural 20 on stealth after killing a goblin.
source_quote: Rolled a natural 20 on stealth after killing a goblin

subject: Klarg Engagement
fact: Klarg engaged the party causing significant damage to Pip and Sister Maela.
source_quote: Pip and Sister Maela took significant damage

subject: Veyra Firebolt
fact: Veyra killed a fleeing goblin with a critical firebolt.
source_quote: killed a fleeing goblin with a critical firebolt (7 points of damage) before it could escape

subject: Klarg Death
fact: Klarg was killed by Zenvon.
source_quote: Klarg was killed

subject: Wolf Subdual
fact: Sister Maela subdued the remaining wolves rather than killing them.
source_quote: subdue the remaining wolves rather than killing them

subject: Looting Klarg's Cave
fact: The party found 1,700 copper pieces in Klarg's cave.
source_quote: The party found 1,700 copper pieces

subject: Looting Klarg's Cave
fact: The party found two potions of healing in Klarg's cave.
source_quote: two potions of healing

subject: Looting Klarg's Cave
fact: The party found a jade statuette of a frog with tiny golden eyes.
source_quote: a jade statuette of a frog with tiny golden eyes

subject: Escort Agreement
fact: The party agreed to escort Sildar to Phandalin.
source_quote: The party agreed to escort Sildar

subject: Return to Phandalin
fact: The party headed to Phandalin for a long rest.
source_quote: headed back to Phandalin for a long rest

subject: Cragmaw Hideout
fact: The Cragmaw Hideout is a cave system cleared by the party.
source_quote: cleared the Cragmaw Hideout

subject: Triboar Trail
fact: The ambush on the Triboar Trail was not a random robbery.
source_quote: ambushed on the Triboar Trail

subject: Phandalin
fact: Phandalin is the destination for the party's long rest.
source_quote: heading back to Phandalin for a long rest

subject: Neverwinter
fact: Sildar offered to be escorted to Neverwinter.
source_quote: escort to Neverwinter/Phandalin

subject: Healing Potions
fact: The party collected healing potions as loot.
source_quote: collected loot including healing potions

subject: Copper Pieces
fact: The party collected copper pieces as loot.
source_quote: copper pieces

subject: Jade Statuette
fact: The party found a jade statuette of a frog with tiny golden eyes.
source_quote: a jade statuette of a frog with tiny golden eyes

subject: Merchant Provisions
fact: The party collected merchant provisions as loot.
source_quote: merchant provisions

subject: Blue Lion Sacks
fact: Sacks and crates marked with a blue lion were found in the cave.
source_quote: sacks and crates marked with a blue lion

subject: Nick Scimitar
fact: Zenvon used a Nick scimitar to deal damage to Klarg.
source_quote: using Nick scimitar + dagger combo

subject: Dagger
fact: Zenvon used a dagger in dual-weapon fighting.
source_quote: dual-weapon fighting (scimitar and dagger)

subject: Goblins
fact: The party defeated multiple goblins at the Cragmaw Hideout.
source_quote: defeating multiple goblins

subject: Wolves
fact: The party defeated multiple wolves at the Cragmaw Hideout.
source_quote: defeating multiple goblins, wolves

subject: Goblin with Elongated Head
fact: A mysterious goblin with an elongated head was mentioned by Sildar.
source_quote: mysterious goblin with an elongated head was mentioned by Sildar

subject: Elongated-headed goblin
fact: The identity of the elongated-headed goblin remains unexplained.
source_quote: The identity of the elongated-headed goblin... remain unexplained

subject: Ruxithid wants
fact: The meaning of the phrase 'You're not what Ruxithid wants' is unknown.
source_quote: a phrase neither Sildar nor the party could interpret

subject: Gundren's location
fact: The party does not know where Gundren was taken.
source_quote: the party still does not know where Gundren was taken

subject: Black Spider
fact: The identity and motives of the Black Spider remain unknown.
source_quote: The identity and motives of the Black Spider remain unknown

subject: Session date
fact: The session was an in-person game.
source_quote: The session was an in-person Dungeons & Dragons game
